name: TinyLLM Pretraining Data Mix v1
language_positioning: Chinese-priority bilingual with English, code, math, long-document, and small multilingual coverage.

buckets.name: Chinese general web
buckets.description: News, encyclopedia-like pages, blogs, long forum posts, and general knowledge web pages.

buckets.name: Chinese education, knowledge, and encyclopedia
buckets.description: Textbook-style content, popular science, encyclopedic writing, course materials, and explanatory content.

buckets.name: Chinese books and long-form documents
buckets.description: Long articles, public books, reports, and coherent long documents.

buckets.name: Chinese professional, QA, and community
buckets.description: Technical QA, vertical-domain articles, and high-quality experience-based answers.

buckets.name: English general web
buckets.description: High-quality web text similar to FineWeb and FineWeb-Edu sources.

buckets.name: English education, knowledge, and encyclopedia
buckets.description: Educational web pages, Wikipedia/reference-style text, tutorials, and explanatory content.

buckets.name: English books and long-form documents
buckets.description: Books, long-form documents, essays, and other coherent long text.

buckets.name: English academic and technical documents
buckets.description: arXiv/PDF-like documents, technical reports, and paper body text.

buckets.name: Code and code documentation
buckets.description: Source code and code documentation across selected programming languages.

buckets.name: Math, STEM, and reasoning text
buckets.description: Math solutions, proofs, STEM textbooks, and verifiable reasoning text in pretraining format rather than chat format.

buckets.name: Other multilingual data
buckets.description: Small amount of generalization data from Japanese, Korean, French, Spanish, German, and other languages.

data_rules: Weights apply after cleaning, deduplication, quality filtering, and tokenization.
Do not mix SFT, chat, or instruction data into base pretraining data.
Each bucket must record source, license, cleaning version, token count, filtering ratio, deduplication ratio, and final shard manifest.

Chinese and English web buckets must run language identification, duplicate-ratio filtering, boilerplate/ad filtering, low-information-density filtering, PII filtering, and benchmark-contamination filtering.
Code data must run license filtering, long-file splitting, duplicate repository/file filtering, generated-file filtering, secret filtering, and benchmark-contamination filtering.

training_stages.name: S1 broad pretrain
training_stages.description: Use this default mix for the 64M trial model first, then for the 120M-130M main MVP model.

training_stages.name: S2 knowledge/reasoning continue pretrain
training_stages.description: After the base run is stable, optionally raise code, math, STEM, and academic/technical data to 25%-30% combined and reduce general web data.

training_stages.name: S3 long-context continue pretrain
training_stages.description: When extending from 4K to 8K context, raise books, papers, reports, and long-web data to train long-document continuity.
